title: poa hirtiglumis var. nimuana
intro: Poa hirtiglumis var. nimuana, also known as the Poa hirtiglumis subsp. nimuana or Tibetan blue grass, is a subspecies of grass native to the Tibetan Plateau. Traditionally, it has been used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In traditional Tibetan medicine, the plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which is consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
